productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Top
description: Composition Black spaghetti top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with stone embellishment branding above hemFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryFor the understated yet stylish vibe, wear this basic united colors of benetton top.
